title: USDA Relationship Specs Production Contract
format_neutral_rules: contracts/document-model-productions/relationship-spec.contract.json#laws — field set and per-kind admission (which excludes attribute-only fields such as variability), listOp subfield rules, and authored target storage are pinned in the format-neutral production. This contract adds USDA-specific grammar dispatch and storage mapping.

deferred: composition of target listOps across layers

storage_mapping.custom: custom field, true only when custom rel is authored
storage_mapping.NamespacedName: property path component and parent propertyChildren entry
storage_mapping.ListOpRelationship: targetPaths field with the authored subfield selected by the listOp token

laws: relationship specs must be stored through usd-document-model
target path leaves must consume usd-paths
ListOpRelationship shares the leading ListOp token with ListOpConnect, so property dispatch must inspect the following tokens before choosing the relationship production

relationship metadata accepts SharedMetadata/ListOpMetadata only; prim-only metadata keywords such as payload, references, inherits, specializes, variants, and variantSets are invalid in relationship metadata
variant selections in relationship target paths must either produce a parse diagnostic or be stripped according to a declared target policy
format_neutral_laws_hoisted: a single target path is authored as an explicit listOp containing one path (document-model-productions/relationship-spec.contract.json#listop_subfield_rules)
None target assignment is authored as an empty listOp (document-model-productions/relationship-spec.contract.json#listop_subfield_rules)

relationship specs admit only shared + relationship_only + custom; other-kind fields including variability are rejected and not interned as extension fields (document-model-productions/common-metadata.contract.json#spec_kind_field_admission)
golden_groups: prepend, append, and delete target listOps
relationship metadata and repeated listOp subfields
target paths with variant selections under the declared policy
